slice_name: Tag a client project with a label
layer: design-layer oracle — the slice's flow test (new) + the NEW CT2 label-extension contract test + the frozen contract tests its seams inherit (by reference) + the MANDATORY scoped regression layer (feature-add). SPECS not code.

happy_path.assertion: F5 traverses CT9 (Web Ingress → Project Management set-label dispatch), CT3 (session resolve), and CT2-extension (Project Management → Data Store label persist/read), arriving at acceptance oracles AC11 + AC13.

failure_path.expected_terminal_state: Data Store raises StoreUnavailableError on the label write; Project Management propagates unmodified; Web Ingress returns 503; label not persisted

new_contract_tests.assertion: NEW additive label-field assertion on the CT2 extension (A14): set_label persists the free-text label on the existing project record and reads it back; store-unavailable / constraint-violation propagate unmodified. The inherited CT2 BASE shape test (S4) is NOT re-authored (H14).

class_ext_specs.basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 (create+manage projects, parent of the tagged project) + integration_seam C1/CT2 (label additive on the project record); NOT the whole inherited suite (Risk R4).
